paper_title: AlexaTM 20B: Few-Shot Learning Using a Large-Scale Multilingual Seq2Seq Model

raw_extraction.innovation: First multilingual seq2seq model capable of in-context learning, combining denoising and causal language modeling objectives for improved few-shot learning, outperforming much larger decoder-only models (e.g., PaLM 540B) on long-context tasks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Wikipedia + mC4 (Arabic, English, French, German, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Marathi, Portuguese, Spanish, Tamil, Telugu)
raw_extraction.application: One-shot summarization, machine translation (including low-resource languages), multilingual reasoning, zero-shot natural language understanding
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (internal use with controlled access)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Multilingual few-shot learning and generalization across low-resource languages using seq2seq architectures
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on generation tasks (summarization, machine translation, etc.)
raw_extraction.extension: Pre-layer normalization (Pre-LN) architecture for improved training stability, Fusion-in-Decoder (FiD) for enhanced few-shot learning
